creator: freebsd@omnilan.de
text:
Build precess stops oat several points with
libtool: error: you must specify a MODE

Fix: I never used libtool before, so no idea if there's a better way to fix, but these patches work for me:
How-To-Repeat: 	Just try to compile security/nessus-libraries with libtool version 2.2.6a_1
